sql_array: CREATE TABLE emails (id INT PRIMARY KEY, email_body STRING, attachments STRING);
INSERT INTO emails VALUES (1, ':5''9XE''m:', '<root><child>Sample XML</child></root>'), (2, '', '<root><child>No Content</child></root>');
SELECT uuvalidate(email_body, 0) FROM emails WHERE id = 1;
SELECT uuvalidate(attachments, 0) AS validated_attachments FROM emails WHERE LENGTH(attachments) > 0;
SELECT id, uuvalidate(email_body, 1) FROM emails WHERE uuvalidate(email_body, 0) IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE messages (msg_id INT PRIMARY KEY, msg_data STRING, msg_type INT);
INSERT INTO messages VALUES (1, 'Test Email\'s Body', 1), (2, 'Another Email Body', 2);
SELECT uuvalidate((SELECT msg_data FROM messages WHERE msg_id = 1), 0) AS validated_message;
SELECT id, uuvalidate(email_body, 0) FROM emails JOIN messages ON emails.id = messages.msg_type WHERE msg_type = 1;
SELECT uuvalidate(attachments, 0) FROM emails WHERE msg_id IN (SELECT msg_id FROM messages WHERE msg_data LIKE '%Email%') AND email_body IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, uuvalidate(email_body, 0) AS encoded_email FROM emails WHERE LENGTH(email_body) BETWEEN 0 AND 50 ORDER BY id;
SELECT uuvalidate(email_body, 0), xpath_split(attachments) AS split_attachments FROM emails WHERE id = (SELECT MIN(id) FROM emails WHERE email_body IS NOT NULL);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM emails GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) > 1;
CREATE TABLE xml_data (data_id INT PRIMARY KEY, xml_content STRING);
SELECT uuvalidate(xpath_split(xml_content), 0) FROM xml_data WHERE data_id = 1;
